novel_features.name: Real-time Failure Watch
novel_features.description: Monitor runs in real time and get instant desktop notifications when tasks fail
novel_features.rationale: No existing tool provides terminal-based real-time failure monitoring - dashboard alerts are webhook-only

novel_features.name: Failure Pattern Analysis
novel_features.description: Automatically identify recurring failure patterns across tasks, error types, and time periods
novel_features.rationale: Requires correlating failed runs, error messages, task identifiers, and timing data that only exists together in the local store

novel_features.name: Task Health Dashboard
novel_features.description: See success rates, durations, costs, and failure trends for every task in one view
novel_features.rationale: Requires aggregating run history across all tasks locally - no single API call provides this summary

novel_features.name: Cost Analysis
novel_features.description: Track spending by task, time period, and machine type to find cost spikes before they hit your bill
novel_features.rationale: Requires aggregating costInCents across many runs with grouping - no existing tool does this

novel_features.name: Stale Schedule Detection
novel_features.description: Find schedules that stopped producing runs or have high failure rates
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining schedule data with run history - only possible with both datasets in the local store

novel_features.name: Queue Bottleneck Detection
novel_features.description: Identify queues with growing backlogs and concurrency limits causing delays
novel_features.rationale: Requires historical queue state snapshots that only exist through periodic local sync

novel_features.name: Environment Diff
novel_features.description: Compare environment variables across dev, staging, and prod to catch drift
novel_features.rationale: Requires fetching from multiple environments and joining locally - SDK has no diff endpoint
